name: Highschool DxD RPG
description:
Okay so mainly when it comes down to writing or when it comes down to creating different parts or finding new ideas to further RPGs I often times have a difficult team when trying to create more tokens because I want to make I like again it's weird for me um yeah hello but for my standpoint now I really want to try to improve when it comes down to creating as minimal boxes possible and to see where I can go from there as like mainly one to make sure that my bots are not or make sure that I can outline as much more and much dorious possible so I just keep filling out information to never satisfied and it's a real big problem because it not creates this issue where I cannot further or I can't add new mechanics or aspects they really got my um character or bots further than initially as my people user or me to feel creative and feel explorative to give people more free than to just do stuff so the fact that I just keep a feeling it up with more and I still want to present that isn't possible because they're on the mutations even with even if I were to use deep other models but it wouldn't change the outcome for long as a lot of the things are still extremely difficult to just get started because I want to make the person who's playing the rpg feel like they're exploring and narrative was all these characters not just I think that's the problem yeah I need to start fixing you know.

But anyway thank you for checking my RPG. Have an good day
